description_long: This object depicts a stylized human figure in a dynamic running pose, with exaggerated, elongated limbs and a forward-leaning torso. The figure is dressed in a fitted, short-sleeve top and tight athletic pants, both rendered in a combination of pale beige and bright yellow-green colors. The head is covered by a rounded cap, matching the yellow-green accents of the outfit. The footwear appears to be streamlined running shoes, also in yellow-green, with a thick sole. The overall form is highly abstracted, with smooth, flowing surfaces and minimal anatomical detail, emphasizing motion and athleticism. The figure's posture suggests mid-stride, with one leg extended forward and the opposite arm swinging back.
description: A stylized, elongated human jogger in a dynamic running pose, wearing a fitted outfit with bright yellow-green and beige colors, and a matching cap and running shoes.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the forward-leaning torso, extended left leg, and swinging right arm, with the cap and facial area visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the elongated limbs, bent right leg, and the smooth, continuous lines of the figure's body.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizing the back of the cap, the curve of the spine, and the trailing right leg and arm.
description_view_3: Right-rear view showing the dynamic stride, the extended left arm, and the overall streamlined silhouette.
attribute_clothing_type: Fitted short-sleeve top and tight leggings, both with smooth, synthetic appearance and color-blocked in beige and yellow-green.
attribute_footwear_type: Running shoes with a thick sole, streamlined design, and bright yellow-green color.
attribute_running_posture: Leaning forward with one leg extended ahead, the opposite arm swinging back, and the other leg bent at the knee, suggesting mid-stride and dynamic motion.
attribute_headwear: Cap, rounded and fitted, in yellow-green matching the outfit.
